problems.text: Alisa the squirrel has 15 acorns and she dropped them all. If she only picked up 11 of the acorns, how many acorns are still on the floor?
Maia is making cookies. She makes 5 chocolate chip cookies, 7 plain cookies, 6 strawberry cookies, and 4 vanilla cookies. How many cookies did Maia make in total?
How many pennies equal one dime?
Natalia is going on a walk. She sees 4 birds, 2 butterflies, and 6 dogs. How many animals does Natalia see?
How many doggies will balance one lion?
